jobs.title: Warehouse person / - salesperson
jobs.salary_range: salary expectations to the email address: jarmo
jobs.meta_description: Discover a new opportunity as a Warehouse person / - salesperson at Bwt Separtec Oy, Raisio in Raisio. Apply now and take the next step in your career.
jobs.description: Bwt Separtec Oy in Raisio is seeking a versatile warehouse person/salesperson for full-time permanent employment. This role involves serving customers, performing general warehouse duties, and assisting with production work and technical support. The ideal candidate should be proficient in both Finnish and English, comfortable using Microsoft Office applications like Outlook and Word, and have experience working with swimming pools and equipment as well as water treatment products. Competitive hourly wages are offered based on Finnish collective agreements, and the position is open until April 30, 2026. Interested candidates should submit a CV and job application along with salary expectations to jarmo.piippula@bwtwater.fi for consideration.
what_we_expect: Finnish and English language skills
PC usage control. E.g. Outlook, Word
Experience with swimming pools and equipment and swimming water chemicals
Experience with water treatment and equipment
Mastering the basics of the electrical industry
job_responsibilities: Receiving customers and selling consumer products
Warehouse work in general. In stock, e.g. Packing, collecting and shipping
Production work and maintenance in the workshop (we provide training for these)
Technical support / maintenance resourcing as needed
what_we_offer: Work experience in warehouse and sales work

Access to the latest research and development information on water treatment and a comprehensive product selection from demanding industrial processes to private homes, we can offer the products we represent all the necessary services from equipment design to installation and maintenance to technical support
jobs.search_keywords: warehouse person, -salesperson, multi-tasker, customer service, warehouse work, production work, workshop, swimming pools, water treatment equipment, BWT Separtec Oy, water treatment industry, Finnish language skills, English language skills, PC usage control, experience with swimming pools and equipment

jobs.title: System Specialist for Energy Sector
jobs.salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
jobs.meta_description: Take the next step in your career as a System Specialist for energy sector, Espoo at Academic Work Finland Oy, located in Helsinki. Apply now and get started.
jobs.description: Academic Work Finland Oy in Helsinki is seeking a System Specialist with expertise in customer portals or digital solutions, combined technical and functional skills, hands-on experience covering the full lifecycle of portal development, familiarity with Agile and DevOps methodologies, and proficiency in English. This role involves collaborating with business stakeholders, backend application teams, and development teams to support cloud-based portal solutions on Microsoft Azure, ensuring reliable and scalable implementations, defining integration approaches within Agile and DevOps frameworks, and contributing to end-to-end customer portal design and support.
what_we_expect: Combined technical and functional expertise in customer portals or digital solutions.
Hands-on experience covering the full lifecycle of portal development and ongoing support.
Familiarity with Agile and DevOps ways of working.
Good understanding of Azure-based cloud architecture for custom portals, alongside foundational knowledge of front-end and back-end technologies.
Keen interest in leveraging AI tools to enhance the development process.
Solid understanding of modern integration patterns and backend connectivity.
job_responsibilities: Gather business requirements and translate them into clear technical specifications.
Act as a techno-functional bridge between business stakeholders, portal development teams, and backend application teams.
Work in Agile and DevOps teams, documenting business needs using tools like Confluence/JIRA.
Contribute to the design and support of end-to-end customer portal solutions, ensuring reliable and scalable implementations.
Support cloud-based portal solutions built on Microsoft Azure, including services such as App Services and Front Door.
Participate in defining and validating integration approaches, including API-based, GraphQL, and batch integrations.
what_we_offer: Our client offers an international professional environment.
Continuous learning and creating meaningful impact towards a cleaner, more sustainable future.
Benefits as a consultant at Academic Work
jobs.search_keywords: System Specialist Energy Sector Espoo Job

jobs.title: Personal assistant
jobs.salary_range: Salary:** Salary is determined in accordance wi
jobs.meta_description: Looking for a Personal assistant job in Rovaniemi? Muukkonen Minna Kristiina, ROVANIEMI is seeking motivated candidates—apply today.
jobs.description: We are seeking a personal assistant for the summer to replace two existing assistants and potentially extend their role into the autumn-winter-spring season with 860 hours per month. The position involves assisting in daily activities, moving, and handling various business tasks. We expect someone who is active, able-bodied, and reliable, with a driver's license and good communication skills. This versatile job offers meaningful work, a relaxed environment, varied working days, and the possibility of continued employment even after the summer. The salary is determined according to JHL and Heta-Liito’s collective agreement, at grade B2, with additional supplements for evening, night, Saturday, and holiday shifts.
what_we_expect: Driver's license and reliable driving skills
A brisk and self-initiated approach to work
Reliability and punctuality
Good communication skills
Ability to act independently and tackle things without constant guidance
job_responsibilities: Moving, doing business and in varying daily situations
Vacancy: personal assistant / summer job + extension opportunity
what_we_offer: A relaxed but functional work environment
The possibility of longer-term work even after the summer
jobs.search_keywords: personal assistant, summer job, extension opportunity, electric wheelchair, reliable driving skills, brisk approach, punctuality, communication skills, independent work, meaningful work, flexible schedule, extended employment

jobs.title: Gig work in Nursing at Attendo, Varkaus-Joroinen-Leppävirta-Pieksämäki
jobs.salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
jobs.meta_description: Apply now for a Gig work in nursing at Attendo, Varkaus-Joroinen-Leppävirta-Pieksämäki role at Attendo Oy.
jobs.description: We are seeking experienced caregivers for gig work in the Varkaus, Leppävirta, Joroinen, and Pieksämäki areas with Attendo Oy. In this role, you will provide care services to elderly and disabled individuals while earning competitive hourly wages based on Finnish collective agreements. We offer a paid orientation at the beginning of employment and support your development through training opportunities. Our commitment is to create meaningful relationships between residents and caregivers, ensuring a home-like environment for our clients. Join us in making a difference in people's lives!
what_we_expect: Degree in the social and health field or you are a field student, at least two parts of the degree have been completed in practical nursing studies
Vaccination protection as referred to in Section 48 of the Infectious Diseases Act to protect customers and patients for the entire duration of the employment
Fluent Finnish language skills, at least level B1.1
job_responsibilities: You can choose how many shifts you do - this way you can fit the work in, for example, with another job, study or family leave side by side.
We commit to a paid orientation at the beginning of the employment relationship.
what_we_offer: We walk by your side With Attendo, your predecessor is not far away, but present in everyday life, supporting and walking by your side.
With us, you are an important part of the multiprofessional team that makes the home a home for our residents. We support your development.
You can choose how many shifts you do - this way you can fit the work in, for example, with another job, study or family leave side by side.
jobs.search_keywords: care industry, gig work, Attendo, nursing, substitute pool

jobs.title: Nursing gig work at Attendo in the Ylä-Savo region
jobs.salary_range: salary a task-specific supplement based on the
jobs.meta_description: Attendo Oy is hiring a Nursing gig work at Attendo in the Ylä-Savo region in Lapinlahti. Explore responsibilities, benefits, and apply today.
jobs.description: Attendo is seeking experienced caregivers to join their team in the Ylä-Savo region. Offering competitive hourly wages based on Finnish collective agreements, this gig work opportunity allows for flexibility and career growth within the company. With a focus on elderly and disabled care, candidates must have completed practical nursing studies or be field students with at least two parts of the degree completed. A strong fluency in Finnish language skills is required, as well as proof of vaccination protection or readiness to obtain it within three months. Attendo provides comprehensive training and development opportunities for its employees, ensuring a supportive work environment that balances professional growth with personal life balance.
